summary: Iteration 16: Complete chatbot integration testing. All 10 features pass - chatbot button appears after ~4s delay, minimize/restore works, chat window opens with welcome message, language selector works (FR/EN/DE/ES/IT/PT), Claude responds in French with vouvoiement, 'Fermer' button closes chat, chatbot appears on sub-pages (/contact, /actualites), hidden on /admin, backend API returns proper JSON structure, markdown renders correctly.

issues: Chatbot button may be hidden when scrolled to footer area (expected behavior due to isNearFooter logic)

critical_code_review_comments: All chatbot components properly implement data-testid attributes
Deferred loading via requestIdleCallback ensures PageSpeed is not impacted
Claude integration via emergentintegrations library works correctly
French responses properly use vouvoiement (formal address)
Chat API returns proper JSON with id, session_id, role, content, language, timestamp fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot fully tested. All 10 features from the test plan verified: delayed appearance (~4s), minimize button (X becomes small green circle), chat window with welcome message, language selector (6 languages), Claude AI responses in French with vouvoiement, Fermer button, presence on sub-pages, hidden on /admin, proper API response format, markdown rendering.

chatbot_minimize_button.details: X button minimizes to small green circle on right side

chat_window_opens.details: Opens with welcome message 'Bonjour ! Comment puis-je vous aider ?'

chat_window_elements.details: Language selector (FR/EN/DE/ES/IT/PT), title 'Paris Greeters', close X button, input field, send button

claude_french_vouvoiement.details: Claude responds in French with correct vouvoiement and relevant Paris Greeters info

fermer_button.details: 'Fermer' button at bottom closes chat window

api_response_format.details: Returns JSON with role, content, session_id, id, language, timestamp fields

markdown_rendering.details: Bold text and paragraphs render correctly (no raw ** visible)

mocked_api.note: Claude is called via emergentintegrations library with real Emergent LLM key
